text:
There used to be this cat who would talk to ducks.

Sometimes she would think they were her friends. Other times they seemed confused by her gibberish meows.

One day she sat beside a wild teal swimming softly upstream.

"Mmmmma?" she meowed.

The teal honked back.

"Mmmmm."

And so she chatted. Every now and then she tried talking louder.

"Woolooloolooo!"

The teal hooted.

Sometimes they would sing together.

That summer she felt pretty special. Rainbows would streak across her path. She'd hop around like disco girl.

Until one day she thought she saw the ducks singing jazz. Fleeting.

Later she found herself staring at nothing.

A book stood open. Duck illustrations.

She flipped through. It was hilarious.

A feather boa, maybe?

Now she smiles each time she looks at pictures. At ducks. Even cats. Everyone loves a good bird friend.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
